title: ornithogalum pyrenaicum var. sulphureum
intro: Ornithogalum pyrenaicum var. sulphureum, also known as Yellow-necked Star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and upright stems. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum pyrenaicum var. sulphureum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin conditions.
